policies.qual:
(EXISTS ( SELECT 1
   FROM profiles p
  WHERE ((p.id = auth.uid()) AND (lower(COALESCE(p.role, ''::text)) = ANY (ARRAY['admin'::text, 'super_admin'::text])))))
policies.with_check:
(EXISTS ( SELECT 1
   FROM profiles p
  WHERE ((p.id = auth.uid()) AND (lower(COALESCE(p.role, ''::text)) = ANY (ARRAY['admin'::text, 'super_admin'::text])))))

policies.qual:
((entry_source = 'petty_cash'::text) AND (created_at >= (now() - '24:00:00'::interval)) AND (EXISTS ( SELECT 1
   FROM profiles p
  WHERE ((p.id = auth.uid()) AND (lower(COALESCE(p.role, ''::text)) = 'cashier'::text) AND ((p.store_id)::text = finance_expenses.store_id)))))

policies.policyname: Allow users to read own orders
Users can read their own orders

functions.arguments: p_inventory_item_id uuid, p_common_name_id uuid, p_transaction_type text, p_quantity numeric, p_unit text, p_quantity_effect numeric, p_reference_type text DEFAULT NULL::text, p_reference_id text DEFAULT NULL::text, p_notes text DEFAULT NULL::text, p_created_by uuid DEFAULT NULL::uuid
p_order_id text, p_items jsonb, p_created_by uuid DEFAULT NULL::uuid
p_quantity numeric, p_from_unit text, p_to_unit text
p_order_id text, p_created_by uuid DEFAULT NULL::uuid

p_expense_id text, p_inventory_item_id uuid, p_common_name_id uuid, p_quantity numeric, p_unit text, p_unit_cost numeric DEFAULT NULL::numeric, p_total_cost numeric DEFAULT NULL::numeric, p_created_by uuid DEFAULT NULL::uuid

indexes.indexdef: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX common_inventory_names_common_name_key ON public.common_inventory_names USING btree (common_name)
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX common_inventory_names_pkey ON public.common_inventory_names USING btree (id)
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX expense_inventory_links_pkey ON public.expense_inventory_links USING btree (id)
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX idx_expense_inventory_links_expense_item ON public.expense_inventory_links USING btree (expense_id, inventory_item_id)
CREATE INDEX finance_expenses_expense_date_idx ON public.finance_expenses USING btree (expense_date DESC)
CREATE INDEX finance_expenses_petty_cash_entry_id_idx ON public.finance_expenses USING btree (petty_cash_entry_id)
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX finance_expenses_pkey ON public.finance_expenses USING btree (id)
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX finance_petty_cash_entries_pkey ON public.finance_petty_cash_entries USING btree (id)
CREATE INDEX finance_petty_cash_entries_store_date_idx ON public.finance_petty_cash_entries USING btree (store_id, expense_date DESC)
CREATE INDEX idx_inventory_items_common_name ON public.inventory_items USING btree (common_name_id)
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX inventory_items_pkey ON public.inventory_items USING btree (id)
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX inventory_settings_pkey ON public.inventory_settings USING btree (id)
CREATE INDEX idx_inventory_transactions_reference ON public.inventory_transactions USING btree (reference_type, reference_id)
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX inventory_transactions_pkey ON public.inventory_transactions USING btree (id)
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX inventory_warnings_pkey ON public.inventory_warnings USING btree (id)
CREATE INDEX idx_menu_item_ingredients_menu_item ON public.menu_item_ingredients USING btree (menu_item_id)
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX menu_item_ingredients_pkey ON public.menu_item_ingredients USING btree (id)
CREATE INDEX idx_menu_items_store ON public.menu_items USING btree (store_id)
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX menu_items_pkey ON public.menu_items USING btree (id)
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX order_items_pkey ON public.order_items USING btree (id)
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX orders_pkey ON public.orders USING btree (id)
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX profiles_email_key ON public.profiles USING btree (email)
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX profiles_loyalty_account_id_unique ON public.profiles USING btree (loyalty_account_id) WHERE (loyalty_account_id IS NOT NULL)
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX profiles_pkey ON public.profiles USING btree (id)
